problem_text: You are a robot arm. Available actions: pick-up X (X must be clear and on the table, hand must be empty), put-down X (place X on the table), stack X Y (place X on Y; Y must be clear, you must be holding X), unstack X Y (pick up X from Y; X must be clear, hand must be empty). You can hold one block at a time. Current state: Block c is on block i. Block e is on the table. Block f is on block j. Block i is on the table. Block j is on block l. Block l is on the table. The hand is empty. Goal: Block c is on block i, block e is on block c, block f is on the table, block i is on the table, block j is on the table, block l is on the table. Respond with a numbered list of actions only. Each action must be exactly one of: pick-up X / put-down X / stack X Y / unstack X Y. No explanation. No extra text.
correct_answer:
pick-up e
stack e c
unstack f j
put-down f
unstack j l
put-down j
